items.title: Xbox Chief Asha Sharma Teases Discord Partnership, Promises to Make Game Pass 'More Flexible'
items.summary: Microsoft Gaming CEO Asha Sharma announced a new Discord partnership for Xbox Game Pass and said the company would continue to make the game subscription service "more flexible"...
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
